summary: Strong capsule: escalating origin latency triggers correctly captured, root cause (upstream TCP reset 502) correctly identified, CPU-limit and TypeError consequences included; KV_NAMESPACE_NOT_FOUND distractor is correctly labeled 'context' rather than root cause.
improvements: The final 502 HTTP response log lines (lines 32, 34) are labeled 'context' when they are more accurately 'consequence' — a reader may underweight user-visible impact
The latency escalation trigger only shows two of four slow-origin warnings (340ms and 412ms), omitting the 580ms and 820ms entries that show the steepening degradation curve before failure
